title: iseilema fragile
intro: Iseilema fragile, a type of grassy plant, is a species within the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Iseilema fragile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments.
